title: Lybrate International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Lybrate International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lybrate International Enterprises family as a Full Stack Developer in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lybrate International Enterprises:
Lybrate International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate International Enterprises!
